# NimbusTrade Solutions

> Singapore-headquartered 4PL and 3PL supply chain advisory firm helping international brands enter and scale across global markets — handling market entry and regulatory approvals, fulfillment and logistics, and omnichannel growth, all under one team.

NimbusTrade Solutions Pte Ltd (云腾贸易方案私人有限公司, UEN 202426085N) is headquartered in Singapore and operates across Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, the Philippines, China, Australia, the UAE, Mexico, the USA, Canada, and the UK — Southeast Asia is where the firm started, not the limit of its reach. NimbusTrade is a brand-enablement partner, not a distributor: clients keep ownership of their retailer and customer relationships while NimbusTrade runs the supply chain, regulatory, and logistics execution underneath. Engagements are led by hands-on operators (fulfillment/supply-chain leadership plus commercial/channel leadership) rather than career consultants.

## Services

- [Market Entry & Regulatory](https://www.nimbustrade.co/#pillars): Singapore Customs licensing, HS code classification, MES/ME permits, JTC and SCDF submissions, import/export permits, cross-border documentation.
- [Fulfillment & Logistics (4PL & 3PL)](https://www.nimbustrade.co/#pillars): full 4PL orchestration or standalone 3PL execution, 3PL selection and vendor management, warehouse strategy, inbound freight and customs clearance, WMS advisory, last-mile delivery, cross-border logistics.
- [Omnichannel Growth](https://www.nimbustrade.co/#pillars): modern trade entry, marketplace enablement (Amazon, Shopee, Lazada, and more), distributor identification, D2C launch, trade marketing, global expansion.
- [White-Glove Delivery](https://www.nimbustrade.co/#pillars): specialist crating, transport, and professional on-site installation and commissioning for high-value furniture, décor, and machinery, delivered as part of the Fulfillment & Logistics pillar.

## Engagement models

- Project-Based: scoped deliverable, fixed scope, fixed fee, clear milestones.
- Retainer Advisory: ongoing monthly advisory with dedicated consultant hours and regulatory monitoring.
- Full-Service Entry: end-to-end market entry across all three pillars, milestone-based billing.

Every engagement starts with a complimentary 30-minute scoping call.

## FAQ

- [Full FAQ section](https://www.nimbustrade.co/#faq) covers: what NimbusTrade does, whether it offers 3PL/4PL, furniture/machinery delivery, markets covered, how it differs from a distributor, and how engagements start.
